name: karpathy
description: Operationalizes Andrej Karpathy's LLM-coding principles as coding-agent skills. Audit agent instruction files, review code diffs before commit, and maintain a local repo wiki for task briefs, Q&A, stale reminders, and wiki health checks.

interface.shortDescription: Audit instructions, review diffs, and maintain a repo wiki.
interface.longDescription: Use Karpathy to audit CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md, and other agent instruction files, review code changes for scope creep and missing verification, and maintain a local Markdown repo wiki for task briefs, Q&A, stale reminders, and wiki health checks. The plugin reports first and applies fixes only after approval.
defaultPrompt: Review my changes before I commit.
Audit this AGENTS.md for agent guidance.
Set up a repo wiki for this project.
Use the repo wiki to brief this task.
